dictionary.welcome: Welcome to Choose Your Adventure Game
dictionary.menu: Choose; 1. Create Character or 2. Exit. Type '1' or '2'
dictionary.attack_prompt: Enter 'a' to attack or 'r' to retreat.
dictionary.victory: With the dragon vanquished, you collect the horde of gold, return home, rich and famous. The End.
dictionary.defeat: The dragon laughs as your eyesight fades. You are defeated. Your family mourns their loss. The End.
dictionary.retreat: You quickly retreat. You come home poor but alive to adventure another day. The End.
dictionary.retreat_combat: You hastily retreat licking your wounds.
dictionary.race_prompt: What race of character do you want to be? Human, Elf, Dwarf or Halfling?
dictionary.race_invalid: Invalid race. Please enter Human, Elf, Dwarf, or Halfling.
dictionary.name_prompt: What is the name of your character?
dictionary.occupation_prompt: What is the occupation of your character? Fighter, Magician, Thief, or Archer?
dictionary.occupation_invalid: Invalid occupation. Please enter Fighter, Magician, Thief, or Archer.
dictionary.roll_strength: Next, we are going to roll for strength. Type 'roll'
dictionary.roll_agility: Next, we will roll for agility. Type 'roll'
dictionary.roll_health: Next, we will roll for health points. Type 'roll'
dictionary.next_action: What would you like to do next? 1. List character stats. 2. Proceed on an adventure. Type 1 or 2.
dictionary.path_prompt_full: You are walking in the mountains. You see two paths, one leading north and higher into the mountains. The other path leads south and into the woods. Which do you take? Enter 'n' for North. Enter 's' for South. Enter 'e' for exit game.
dictionary.south_path_narrative: You take the South path. After many long days, nothing adventurous happens. You are bored and return home, poor, and still bored.
dictionary.north_path_narrative: You take the North path. After walking for hours, the air grows colder, and the trees become more sparse. You are confronted with a dragon. The dragon has a hoard of gold behind it.
dictionary.dragon_intro: The dragon says 'I am {0}. Leave or perish!'
dictionary.dragon_stats_intro: Your magic ring gives you the stats on the dragon.
dictionary.dragon_encounter_prompt: Do you wish to retreat or attack? Enter 'r' for retreat. Enter 'a' for attack.
dictionary.player_attack_intro: As a {0}, you withdraw your {1} and attack the dragon.
dictionary.dragon_defeated_narrative: With the last words of 'Arggg!', you have defeated the dragon.
dictionary.dragon_defense_taunt_1: Missed me, breath of a gnat!
dictionary.dragon_defense_taunt_2: Is that all you've got? I've seen kittens with more fire in their paws!
dictionary.dragon_defense_taunt_3: Try harder, {0}! You're making me yawn!
dictionary.dragon_defense_taunt_4: Maybe if you squinted harder, you'd actually hit something!
dictionary.dragon_damage_reply_1: Ow! That actually stung a bit!
dictionary.dragon_damage_reply_2: Impressive! You might actually be worth toasting...
dictionary.dragon_damage_reply_3: That... was unexpected. But I assure you, it won't happen again.
dictionary.dragon_damage_reply_4: Well, I'll be! You have more bite than I thought!

dictionary.welcome: Bienvenido al Juego de Elige Tu Aventura
dictionary.menu: Elige; 1. Crear Personaje o 2. Salir. Escribe '1' o '2'
dictionary.attack_prompt: Escribe 'a' para atacar o 'r' para retirarse.
dictionary.victory: Ganaste! El dragon ha sido derrotado!
dictionary.defeat: Perdiste! El dragon te ha vencido.
dictionary.retreat: Te has retirado de la batalla.
dictionary.retreat_combat: Te retiras apresuradamente mientras lames tus heridas.
dictionary.race_prompt: Que raza de personaje quieres ser? Humano, Elfo, Enano o Mediano?
dictionary.race_invalid: Raza invalida. Por favor escribe Humano, Elfo, Enano o Mediano.
dictionary.name_prompt: Cual es el nombre de tu personaje?
dictionary.name_invalid: El nombre no puede estar vacio.
dictionary.occupation_prompt: Cual es la ocupacion de tu personaje? Guerrero, Mago, Ladron o Arquero?
dictionary.occupation_invalid: Ocupacion invalida. Por favor escribe Guerrero, Mago, Ladron o Arquero.
dictionary.roll_strength: Ahora vamos a tirar para la fuerza. Escribe 'roll'
dictionary.roll_agility: Ahora vamos a tirar para la agilidad. Escribe 'roll'
dictionary.roll_health: Ahora vamos a tirar para los puntos de vida. Escribe 'roll'
dictionary.next_action: Que quieres hacer? 1. Ver estadisticas. 2. Comenzar aventura. Escribe 1 o 2.
dictionary.stats_damage: Puntos Maximos de Dano del Arma:
dictionary.path_prompt_full: Estas caminando en las montanas. Ves dos caminos, uno va al norte y mas arriba en las montanas. El otro va al sur y hacia el bosque. Cual tomas? Escribe 'n' para Norte. Escribe 's' para Sur. Escribe 'e' para salir del juego.
dictionary.path_invalid: Opcion invalida. Por favor escribe 'n', 's' o 'e'.
dictionary.south_path_narrative: Tomas el camino del sur. Despues de muchos dias largos, no pasa nada aventurero. Te aburres y regresas a casa, pobre y todavia aburrido.
dictionary.north_path_narrative: Tomas el camino del norte. Despues de caminar durante horas, el aire se vuelve mas frio y los arboles mas escasos. Te enfrentas a un dragon. El dragon tiene una horda de oro detras de el.
dictionary.dragon_intro: El dragon dice 'Soy {0}. Vete o perece!'
dictionary.dragon_stats_intro: Tu anillo magico te da las estadisticas del dragon.
dictionary.dragon_encounter_prompt: Deseas retirarte o atacar? Escribe 'r' para retirarte. Escribe 'a' para atacar.
dictionary.player_attack_intro: Como {0}, sacas tu {1} y atacas al dragon.
dictionary.dragon_health_now: Los puntos de vida de {0} ahora son {1}.
dictionary.dragon_defeated_narrative: Con las ultimas palabras de 'Arggg!', has derrotado al dragon.
dictionary.player_health_now: Los puntos de vida de {0} ahora son {1}.
dictionary.dragon_defense_taunt_1: Ni me tocaste, aliento de mosquito!
dictionary.dragon_defense_taunt_2: Eso es todo lo que tienes? He visto gatitos con mas fuego en sus patas!
dictionary.dragon_defense_taunt_3: Esfuerzate mas, {0}! Me estas dando sueno!
dictionary.dragon_defense_taunt_4: Tal vez si entrecerraras mas los ojos, de verdad acertarias!
dictionary.dragon_damage_reply_1: Ay! Eso si dolio un poco!
dictionary.dragon_damage_reply_2: Impresionante! Tal vez realmente valga la pena tostarte...
dictionary.dragon_damage_reply_3: Eso... fue inesperado. Pero te aseguro que no volvera a pasar.
dictionary.dragon_damage_reply_4: Vaya! Tienes mas fuerza de la que pensaba!

dictionary.menu: Choisissez; 1. Creer un Personnage ou 2. Quitter. Tapez '1' ou '2'
dictionary.attack_prompt: Tapez 'a' pour attaquer ou 'r' pour vous retirer.
dictionary.victory: Vous avez gagne! Le dragon a ete vaincu!
dictionary.defeat: Vous avez perdu! Le dragon vous a vaincu.
dictionary.retreat: Vous vous etes retire du combat.
dictionary.retreat_combat: Vous vous retirez rapidement en pansant vos blessures.
dictionary.race_prompt: Quelle race de personnage voulez-vous etre? Humain, Elfe, Nain ou Halfelin?
dictionary.race_invalid: Race invalide. Veuillez entrer Humain, Elfe, Nain ou Halfelin.
dictionary.name_prompt: Quel est le nom de votre personnage?
dictionary.name_invalid: Le nom ne peut pas etre vide.
dictionary.occupation_prompt: Quelle est la profession? Guerrier, Magicien, Voleur ou Archer?
dictionary.occupation_invalid: Profession invalide. Veuillez entrer Guerrier, Magicien, Voleur ou Archer.
dictionary.roll_strength: Nous allons lancer pour la force. Tapez 'roll'
dictionary.roll_agility: Nous allons lancer pour l'agilite. Tapez 'roll'
dictionary.roll_health: Nous allons lancer pour les points de vie. Tapez 'roll'
dictionary.next_action: Que voulez-vous faire? 1. Voir les stats. 2. Commencer l'aventure. Tapez 1 ou 2.
dictionary.path_prompt_full: Vous marchez dans les montagnes. Vous voyez deux chemins, l'un mene vers le nord et plus haut dans les montagnes. L'autre mene vers le sud et dans les bois. Lequel choisissez-vous ? Tapez 'n' pour Nord. Tapez 's' pour Sud. Tapez 'e' pour quitter le jeu.
dictionary.south_path_narrative: Vous prenez le chemin du sud. Apres de longues journees, rien d'aventureux n'arrive. Vous vous ennuyez et rentrez chez vous, pauvre et toujours ennuye.
dictionary.north_path_narrative: Vous prenez le chemin du nord. Apres avoir marche pendant des heures, l'air devient plus froid et les arbres plus rares. Vous etes confronte a un dragon. Le dragon a un tresor d'or derriere lui.
dictionary.dragon_intro: Le dragon dit 'Je suis {0}. Pars ou peris !'
dictionary.dragon_stats_intro: Votre anneau magique vous donne les statistiques du dragon.
dictionary.dragon_encounter_prompt: Souhaitez-vous vous retirer ou attaquer ? Tapez 'r' pour vous retirer. Tapez 'a' pour attaquer.
dictionary.player_attack_intro: En tant que {0}, vous sortez votre {1} et attaquez le dragon.
dictionary.dragon_health_now: Les points de vie de {0} sont maintenant de {1}.
dictionary.dragon_defeated_narrative: Avec les derniers mots 'Arggg!', vous avez vaincu le dragon.
dictionary.player_health_now: Les points de vie de {0} sont maintenant de {1}.
dictionary.dragon_defense_taunt_1: Tu m'as rate, souffle de moucheron!
dictionary.dragon_defense_taunt_2: C'est tout ce que tu as? J'ai vu des chatons avec plus de feu dans leurs pattes!
dictionary.dragon_defense_taunt_3: Essaie plus fort, {0}! Tu me fais bailler!
dictionary.dragon_defense_taunt_4: Peut-etre qu'en plissant davantage les yeux, tu pourrais vraiment toucher!
dictionary.dragon_damage_reply_1: Aie! Ca a pique un peu!
dictionary.dragon_damage_reply_2: Impressionnant! Tu vaux peut-etre vraiment la peine d'etre grille...
dictionary.dragon_damage_reply_3: C'etait... inattendu. Mais je t'assure que cela ne se reproduira pas.
dictionary.dragon_damage_reply_4: Eh bien! Tu as plus de mordant que je ne le pensais!
